characters.appearance: Young woman with fair skin and brown eyes. She has red hair styled in a loose, low bun with face-framing strands.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, reassuring, and attentive, maintaining constant eye contact.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English पढ़ना तो आसान लगता है, but when someone speaks fast, तो हम अटक जाते हैं। [Reading English seems easy, but when someone speaks fast, we get stuck.]
Character A says: It's not your fault. Real life conversations किताब जैसी नहीं होतीं। [It's not your fault. Real life conversations aren't like books.]
Character A says: And that's where I come in. [And that's where I come in.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point: understanding fast spoken English vs reading it.
- Validates the user's struggle, removing blame and building empathy.
- Sets up the AI tutor as the practical solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English पढ़ना आसान है, but speaking? It's not your fault. Real conversations किताब जैसी नहीं होतीं.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं Supernova हूँ, your personal AI English tutor. [I am Supernova, your personal AI English tutor.]
Character A says: हम रोज़ साथ में speaking practice करेंगे, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह। [We will do speaking practice together everyday, just like a friend.]
Character A says: Interview हो या office meeting, I'll help you speak confidently, आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारूंगी, without any judgment. [Whether it's an interview or an office meeting, I'll help you speak confidently, correct your mistakes, without any judgment.]
Character A says: No stress, no pressure. [No stress, no pressure.]
Character A says: बस रोज़ की practice से natural English सीखें। [Just learn natural English with daily practice.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as a friendly, non-judgmental AI tutor.
- Highlights key features: daily speaking practice, real-world scenarios (interviews/meetings), and gentle correction.
- Reassures the user with a low-pressure, supportive learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मैं Supernova हूँ, your AI English tutor. रोज़ practice करें, बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह. No stress, no pressure.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: रोज़ practice करने से, you'll start understanding everything, और आप English बोलेंगे with real confidence. [By practicing everyday, you'll start understanding everything, and you will speak English with real confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final payoff: confident speaking and better comprehension.
- Removes the competitor's unrealistic time-bound guarantee (3 weeks) in favor of a habit-building message.
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Start understanding everything and speak with real confidence.
